name: nf
description: fzf pick file to open in neovim
source: alias: f(){ local f; f=$(fzf -1 -0) || return; nvim "$f"; }; f

name: vf
description: fzf pick file to open in vim
source: alias: f(){ local f; f=$(fzf -1 -0) || return; vim "$f"; }; f

name: agents_migrate
description: migrate existing AGENTS.md to split BASE/PROJECT layout

name: agents_refresh
description: refresh split AGENTS.md BASE link from current environment

name: chpwd
description: refresh tmux status on dir change

name: tmux_reload
description: reload tmux config and keybinds TSV
